name: Sediment Core 210Pb and 137Cs Dating Data from LSMo22-1, Mexico
description: This dataset contains sediment core analysis results from event LSMo22-1, including depth intervals (top, bottom, and total depth) and radioisotope concentrations of Lead-210 (210Pb) and Cesium-137 (137Cs). The data includes supported and unsupported 210Pb fractions with their respective standard deviations, collected at a specific elevation in Mexico on April 8, 2022, to facilitate sedimentation rate calculations and geochronology.
